plugins.name: kernel
plugins.description: Durable project memory, bounded JSON handoffs, engineering workflows, and independent verification for Claude Code and Codex. KERNEL 8.3.0 adds optional local semantic recall: sentence embeddings (fastembed/MiniLM, on-machine) fused with FTS keyword search via reciprocal-rank fusion, measured +0.10 recall@5, degrading gracefully to FTS-only with no backend.
